# Sprint 1.2 Data Joining Strategy

**Project:** TrendBuy Return Reduction Initiative
**Sprint:** Sprint 1. Data Aggregation And Cleaning
**Objective:** Create a single, analytics-ready dataset linking trend exposure, purchase behavior, and post-purchase outcomes.

## Description
Develop a data joining strategy to associate purchases with trends active before the purchase timestamp.

## Deliverable
Data joining strategy document
